mission.title: linkerd: Linkerd Tap doesn't seem to work with EKS Access Entries authentication
mission.description: Linkerd Tap doesn't seem to work with EKS Access Entries authentication. This issue affects 6+ users.

steps.title: Identify linkerd troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your linkerd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review linkerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
kubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd
```
### What is the issue?

I was trying to use `linkerd viz tap` to debug an internal issue, but kept getting `tap authorization failed`.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Linkerd Tap doesn't seem to work with EKS Access Entries…
steps.description:
We have this same issue.

```
Kubernetes Version: v1.31
Cluster Environment: AWS EKS
Host OS: Amazon Bottlerocket
linkerd version
Client version: edge-25.3.2
Server version: edge-25.1.2
```

We can not tap in the UI, or on the CLI

```

yes
```

```
 linkerd viz tap -n linkerd
```yaml
linkerd-identity
----------------
× trust anchors are using supported crypto algorithm
    Invalid trustAnchors:
        * 498364598153846236906649535816328601770266843336 One Model Linkerd Root CA must use P-256 curve for public key, instead P-384 was used
    see https://linkerd.io/2/checks/#l5d-identity-trustAnchors-use-supported-crypto for hints

linkerd-jaeger
--------------
‼ jaeger extension proxies are up-to-date
    some proxies are not running the current version:
        * collector-9cb9f47cb-2p4dn (edge-24.10.1)
        * collector-9cb9f47cb-s8zg2 (edge-24.10.1)
        * jaeger-in
```

steps.title: Upgrade linkerd to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade linkerd:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade linkerd linkerd/linkerd --namespace linkerd
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n linkerd
helm list -n linkerd
```

steps.title: Confirm Linkerd Tap doesn't seem to work with EKS Access… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
We have this same issue.

```
Kubernetes Version: v1.31
Cluster Environment: AWS EKS
Host OS: Amazon Bottlerocket
linkerd version
Client version: edge-25.3.2
Server version: edge-25.1.2
```

We can not tap in the UI, or on the CLI

```

yes
```

```
 linkerd viz tap -n linkerd deploy/linkerd-controller --as $(whoami)
Cannot connect to Linkerd Viz: namespaces is forbidden: User "justin" cannot
codeSnippets:
linkerd-identity
----------------
× trust anchors are using supported crypto algorithm
    Invalid trustAnchors:

    see https://linkerd.io/2/checks/#l5d-identity-trustAnchors-use-supported-crypto for hints

linkerd-jaeger
--------------
‼ jaeger extension proxies are up-to-date
    some proxies are not running the current version:

        * collector-9cb9f47cb-s8zg2 (edge-24.10.1)
        * jaeger-injector-759b7ff6fb-5xcmz (edge-24.10.1)
        * jaeger-injector-759b7ff6fb-q46tg (edge-24.10.1)
    see https://linkerd.io/2/checks/#l5d-jaeger-proxy-cp-version for hints
‼ jaeger extension proxies a

Kubernetes Version: v1.31
Cluster Environment: AWS EKS
Host OS: Amazon Bottlerocket
linkerd version
Client version: edge-25.3.2
Server version: edge-25.1.2

> kubectl auth can-i watch pods.tap.linkerd.io --all-namespaces --as system:serviceaccount:linkerd-viz:web
yes

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with linkerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
